note: Balancer V3 BatchRouter user pre-sign surface. Covered: swapExactIn (aggregate Amm::Swap via balancer_v3_swap_path_field), permitBatchAndCall (multicall_recurse, the dominant entry), multicall. swapExactOut deferred (0 recent tx). Source: balancer/balancer-deployments v3 20241205-v3-batch-router.

0xac9650d8.name: multicall
0xac9650d8.reason: multicall(bytes[]) of BatchRouter self-calls — 0 recent direct tx (users bundle via permitBatchAndCall); decodable via multicall_recurse, excluded for now.

0x19c6989f.name: permitBatchAndCall
0x19c6989f.reason: user wrapper: Permit2 batch + multicall of BatchRouter self-calls (chiefly swapExactIn). Decoded via multicall_recurse. ~68% of recent direct BatchRouter tx.

0x286f580d.name: swapExactIn
0x286f580d.reason: user AMM action: V3 BatchRouter multi-hop exact-in swap. Decoded to aggregate Amm::Swap via balancer_v3_swap_path_field (tokenIn + last step tokenOut from calldata; no baked map). ~32% of recent direct BatchRouter tx.
